Class EfsSubscription<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.feed.EfsSubscription<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event type.
public final class EfsSubscription<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object
EfsFeed.subscribe(IEfsAgent, Consumer, EfsInterval) returns an EfsSubscription instance which may be used to close() the subscription.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    beginsPast(int index, Instant time)
    Returns true if this subscription begins in the past and false otherwise.
    void
    close()
    Marks this subscription as inactive.
    int
    compare(int index, Instant time)
    Returns integer value <, equal to, or > zero if given event index or time (based on endpoint type) is before, during, or after this subscription's interval.
    boolean
    endsFuture(int index, Instant time)
    Returns true if this subscription ends in the future and false otherwise.
    Consumer<E>
    eventCallback()
    Returns subscriber's event lambda callback.
    EfsInterval
    interval()
    Returns subscription interval.
    boolean
    isActive()
    Returns true if this subscription is active and false if inactive.
    IEfsAgent
    subscriber()
    Returns subscribing agent.

  • Method Details

    • subscriber

      public IEfsAgent subscriber()
      Returns subscribing agent.
      Returns:
      subscribing agent.

    • eventCallback

      public Consumer<E> eventCallback()
      Returns subscriber's event lambda callback.
      Returns:
      event lambda callback.

    • interval

      public EfsInterval interval()
      Returns subscription interval.
      Returns:
      subscription interval.

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Returns true if this subscription is active and false if inactive.
      Returns:
      true if subscription is active.

    • compare

      public int compare(int index, Instant time)
      Returns integer value <, equal to, or > zero if given event index or time (based on endpoint type) is before, during, or after this subscription's interval.
      Parameters:
      index - latest feed event index.
      time - latest feed event timestamp.
      Returns:
      integer value <, equal to, or > zero.

    • beginsPast

      public boolean beginsPast(int index, Instant time)
      Returns true if this subscription begins in the past and false otherwise.
      Parameters:
      index - current feed index.
      time - current feed time.
      Returns:
      true if subscription begins in the past.

    • endsFuture

      public boolean endsFuture(int index, Instant time)
      Returns true if this subscription ends in the future and false otherwise.
      Parameters:
      index - current feed index.
      time - current feed time.
      Returns:
      true if subscription ends in the future.

    • close

      public void close()
      Marks this subscription as inactive. This does not mean a subscribing agent will cease receiving events after this call as there may be in-flight events yet to be delivered to subscriber.

      Once a subscription is closed it cannot be re-opened. A new subscription must be made in order to receive feed events again.
